findings.description: Unchecked null dereference: cursor.fetchone() can return None when user_id does not exist, causing TypeError on row[0] access
File I/O has no exception handling: open() and json.dump() can raise IOError/OSError if /tmp/cache/ does not exist or disk is full
No input validation on user_id parameter: should verify it is non-None and of expected type before database query
Missing docstring: public function load_user_profile lacks documentation of parameters, return value, and possible exceptions

notes: The P0 null dereference is the critical finding — a missing user row causes an unhandled crash. The nested key access on profile['settings']['notifications'] at line 18 is also fragile but secondary to the fetchone() None case.
